---
title: "analysis"
author: "Hayes Waddell"
output: html_document
---

# Analysis

Finding the best pitch in the MLB 2025 season based on count.

## 2-0 Changeup

I once had a pitching coach tell me the 2-0 changeup is the best pitch in baseball, lets find out.

```{r}
# load necessary library
library(tidyverse)

# summarize league average stats
lg_avg <- df_combined %>%
  summarise(
    xwoba = mean(xwoba),
    whiff_rate = mean(whiff_rate),
    swing_rate = mean(swing_rate)
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = "League Avg")

# select 2-0 changup stats
ch_20 <- df_combined %>%
  filter(count == "2-0", pitch_type == "CH") %>%
  select(xwoba, whiff_rate, swing_rate) %>%
  mutate(label = "2-0 Changeup")

# combine rows and plot
p1 <- bind_rows(lg_avg, ch_20) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(xwoba, whiff_rate, swing_rate), 
               names_to = "stat", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = label, y = value, fill = stat)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, 
       title = "2-0 Changeup vs League Average for all pitch types and counts") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray60")
    )
  
# save plot to plots folder
ggsave("plots/ch_20_vs_league.png", plot = p1, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```
